news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on May 7, 2025, Georgia-Pacific and other manufacturers are enhancing operations by utilizing a combination of SAS artificial intelligence technology and Epic Games' engine. SAS is at the forefront of revolutionizing manufacturing processes by introducing advanced digital twins. This innovative approach integrates SAS' expertise, allowing companies to improve efficiency and productivity.
news.headline: SAS and Unreal Engine partner to enhance manufacturing operations with digital twins, improving processes.

news.summary: A recent report states that the global economy is projected to grow by around 3.5% this year, a significant increase from the previous estimate of 2.9%. This growth is expected to primarily be driven by strong performances in the United States, China, and the Eurozone. Additionally, global trade volume is predicted to rise by approximately 8% in 2021, with merchandise trade expected to increase by 16% and services trade by 2%. The forecasted growth rates represent a notable recovery from the economic downturn caused by the COVID-19 pandemic. Experts attribute the positive outlook to successful vaccination campaigns, government stimulus packages, and a resurgence in consumer confidence. Despite these optimistic projections, uncertainties remain due to ongoing pandemic-related challenges and potential inflationary pressures.
news.headline: Poland cuts interest rate for the first time since 2023 as election approaches. #economy #Poland

news.summary: XRP is trading at $2.13, up 1.55% on Wednesday and 18.3% higher over the past month. The increased interest from institutional investors, positive legal developments, and a growing derivatives market have boosted confidence in Ripple's native token. CME Group will launch XRP futures on May 19, providing institutional access to the token and putting XRP alongside Bitcoin and Ethereum in the futures market. XRP daily transactions have surged to over $5.3 billion, with active wallet addresses rising more than 600% in the last week. Ripple's legal battle with the SEC is trending in its favor.
news.headline: XRP price climbs to $2.13, up 18.3% in a month. CME launching XRP futures on May 19. Daily transactions surpass $5.3 billion.

news.summary: RWE has inaugurated six renewable energy ventures with a combined operational capacity of 999 megawatts. These projects, comprised of one new wind farm, one refurbished wind farm, three fresh solar initiatives, and a separate battery energy storage project, aim to enhance grid stability and energy assurance.
news.headline: RWE boosts U.S. operations with 999 MW from 6 renewable energy projects: 2 wind farms, 3 solar projects, 1 storage project.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on May 7, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide Single Cell Analysis Market, which was worth US$3.55 billion in 2024, is predicted to expand at a strong CAGR of 14.7%. news.headline: Global Single Cell Analysis Market to reach US$7.56 billion by 2030 with 14.7% CAGR, started from US$3.55 billion in 2024.

news.summary: Immerse yourself in a mesmerizing blend of art and technology as Steven Harrington's playful Pop Art springs to existence on LG's cutting-edge TVs for the year 2025. In an exciting collaboration, LG Electronics (LG) has joined forces with the legendary psychedelic pop artist and creator of the LA 2028 Olympics emblem. This innovative partnership promises to bring a unique experience to viewers, showcasing Harrington's distinctive style on LG's most advanced televisions.
news.headline: LG partners with artist Steven Harrington to showcase vibrant pop art on transparent OLED TV at Frieze New York, merging art and technology for 2025 TVs.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, FirstService Corporation disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.275 per Common Share. The dividend, declared by the Board of Directors, is set to be paid on July 8, 2025, to shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025. This dividend is considered an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax reasons. FirstService Corporation is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: FSV) and the NASDAQ (NASDAQ: FSV).
news.headline: FirstService declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.275 per Common Share, payable on July 8, 2025.

news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) surged by 3.4% to reach $97,124, boosted by growing investor confidence and strong on-chain support. This marks a 3.5% increase over the last week and a significant 28% rise in the past month, indicating a bullish trend ahead of the upcoming May Federal Reserve meeting. Glassnode, a blockchain analytics firm, highlights a strengthening accumulation trend among both long- and short-term BTC holders. The cryptocurrency is now approaching a key resistance level near $99,900, which historically triggers profit-taking behaviors and will test the market's ability to maintain upward momentum. For those interested in trading crypto futures, Plus500 offers up to $200 in bonuses with no need for wallets, practicing free paper trading. Furthermore, newcomers to crypto trading can earn rewards of up to $400 by completing educational courses and conducting their first qualifying trade on Coinbase. Glassnode's data reveals a steady increase in long-term holders (LTHs) amid this market trend.
news.headline: Bitcoin price hits $97,124 with on-chain accumulation boost. Up 3.4% in a day, 28% in a month. May rally expected.

news.summary: Solana's (SOL) price rose by 2.97% on Wednesday, reaching $146.56. The cryptocurrency has surged by 43% in the last month, drawing investor interest ahead of the Federal Reserve interest rate decision. The Layer-1 blockchain is gaining momentum with key network developments. Solana Name Service (SNS) unveiled its SNS token this week on the Solana platform, replacing FIDA. The new token, out of a total supply of 10 billion, reserves 40% for airdrops, with 20% designated for early adopters of the .sol domain and loyal project supporters. The airdrop aims to reward loyalty but could lead to short-term volatility in the market. Enjoy up to $200 in bonuses for trading crypto futures on Plus500, with paper trading available for practicing strategies. For more details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Solana's SOL hits $146.56, up 2.97%, with 43% rally over a month. SNS airdrop ahead of FOMC decision.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Norwalk, Connecticut, CredCore, a vertical-AI firm revolutionizing the debt capital markets, joined FactSet's AI Partner Program. As part of this collaboration, CredCore will incorporate FactSet's Debt Capital Structure (DCS) DataFeed into its AI platform. This partnership signifies a significant step for CredCore as it aims to enhance its capabilities using FactSet's reliable data.
news.headline: CredCore partners with FactSet, integrating Debt Capital Structure DataFeed into AI platform for debt capital markets.

news.summary: In WOKING, UK, on May 7, 2025, IDBS, a top provider of cloud software for BioPharma firms, released findings from a recent survey on lab data management in Pharma/BioPharma. The survey highlighted pressing issues and upcoming priorities for industry. The insights aim to address key challenges faced by companies. This survey signifies IDBS's dedication to aiding BioPharma.
news.headline: IDBS shares survey insights on lab data management in BioPharma sector. Key findings and priorities discussed.

news.summary: Glen Burnie Bancorp, the bank holding company for The Bank of Glen Burnie, announced its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $153,000, equivalent to $0.05 per basic and diluted common share. This is an improvement from the net income of $3,000, or $0 per basic and diluted common share, for the same period in 2024. As of March 31, 2025, Bancorp's total assets amounted to $358.0 million. Known as the oldest independent commercial bank in Anne Arundel County, Bancorp is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol GLBZ.
news.headline: Glen Burnie Bancorp reports Q1 2025 net income of $153,000, assets totaling $358M. Nasdaq: GLBZ. Oldest bank in Anne Arundel County.

news.summary: Nutanix has just released the new version of Nutanix Enterprise AI (NAI) to the public, which includes enhanced integration with NVIDIA AI Enterprise for improved functionality. This collaboration aims to provide users with more advanced AI capabilities.
news.headline: Nutanix launches latest version of Nutanix Enterprise AI, enabling Agentic AI anywhere with NVIDIA AI Enterprise.

news.summary: In a recent event, held in Montréal, HGreg was recognized at the 2025 Mercuriades Awards organized by the Fédération des chambres de commerce du Québec (FCCQ). They were presented with the Mercure Award in the EDC International Market Development category. Additionally, the company was a finalist in the TELUS Technology Innovation category. The prestigious EDC International Market Development Award acknowledges the outstanding achievements of a Québec-based company in expanding its global presence through exports or foreign direct investments. This recognition showcases HGreg’s success and commitment to international business growth.
news.headline: HGreg wins Mercure Award in EDC International Market Development; finalist in TELUS category at 2025 Mercuriades Awards.

news.summary: Exciting developments are on the horizon for housing in Discovery Bay, Lincoln, and Mountain House in SACRAMENTO, Calif. Set to debut on May 7, 2025, Century Communities, Inc. (NYSE: CCS), a leading nationwide homebuilder renowned for its expertise in online home sales, is spearheading this initiative. The company, recognized among America's Most Trustworthy Companies and World's Most reputable entities, is gearing up to introduce a significant number of new homes in these areas, promising a fresh array of housing options for prospective buyers.
news.headline: Century Communities to launch 4 new communities in Northern California including Discovery Bay, Lincoln, and Mountain House.

news.summary: Pavement marking company Safety Marking has recently acquired Straight Line Industries, which is based in Upstate New York. This acquisition marks Safety Marking's expansion into the Northeastern U.S. region. Safety Marking, known as SMC, is a prominent provider of pavement marking services. The transaction was finalized on May 7, 2025 in Bridgeport, Connecticut. This strategic move will significantly increase Safety Marking's presence in the region and optimize their service offerings.
news.headline: Safety Marking acquires Straight Line Industries in Upstate NY, expanding its reach in Northeastern U.S. - reported on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: EBANX has recently introduced UPI Autopay for global enterprises, streamlining international transactions and broadening entry into India's flourishing digital market. The announcement was made in Singapore on May 7, 2025. India is proving to be a crucial player in the global market, with its economy poised for substantial growth. This move by EBANX will allow businesses to tap into India's market potential and take advantage of the increasing digitalization in the country. With this integration, companies can now access the vast opportunities presented by India's market through seamless and efficient cross-border transactions.
news.headline: EBANX integrates UPI recurring payments for cross-border e-commerce in India, expanding access to India's growing digital market.

news.summary: In a recent announcement from El Segundo, California on May 7, 2025, TenCate revealed the introduction of its latest product, Pivot® Performance Turf, at Wiseburn Da Vinci High School. This advanced turf innovation eliminates the need for performance infill typically used in turf systems, offering a playing surface that closely mimics natural grass. The Pivot turf by TenCate showcases cutting-edge technology and aims to provide an unparalleled experience for athletes and students.
news.headline: TenCate installs Pivot® Performance Turf at Wiseburn Da Vinci High School, a next-gen turf requiring no black pellets.

news.headline: Globalstar (Nasdaq: GSAT) to participate in B. Riley 25th Annual Institutional Investor Conference on May 21 in California.

news.summary: Visa has made a strategic investment in London-based startup BVNK, which focuses on stablecoin payment infrastructure. The investment from Visa Ventures is described as more than just capital and is seen as a partnership. BVNK's CEO highlights the potential of partnering with Visa to redefine business operations in the digital economy. Visa's head of products and partnerships mentions that stablecoins are becoming integral to global payment flows. BVNK recently closed a $50 million Series B funding round and is expanding into the United States. Visa has been increasing its involvement in the crypto space, allowing users to deposit and withdraw funds from Coinbase and introducing the Visa Tokenized Asset Platform. Visa's investment in BVNK showcases its interest in digital asset innovation and stablecoin technology.
news.headline: Visa invests undisclosed amount in London stablecoin startup BVNK, focusing on digital asset innovation and payments future.

news.summary: Visa has invested in BVNK, a London-based startup focusing on stablecoin payment infrastructure. BVNK announced the strategic investment from Visa through their Visa Ventures arm, calling it "more than capital" and a partnership. BVNK closed a $50 million Series B funding round at the end of 2024, led by Haun Ventures, and involving industry players like Coinbase Ventures and Tiger Global. BVNK, valued at about $750 million at the time, plans to expand into the United States. Visa emphasizes its involvement in the crypto space, allowing users to deposit and withdraw funds from Coinbase using eligible Visa debit cards. Visa has also launched the Visa Tokenized Asset Platform to streamline tokenized assets management. This partnership signifies Visa's interest in digital asset innovation and their commitment to exploring new technologies for their clients and partners.
news.headline: Visa invests in London startup BVNK's stablecoin payment platform, emphasizing digital asset innovation with $50 million funding.

news.summary: In San Angelo, Texas, on May 7, 2025, ICC – International Chemicals LLC, a subsidiary of SMC Global, introduced AvanScav 1450, an advanced hydrogen sulfide (H₂S) scavenger targeted at oilfield operators seeking high performance. The product aims to meet the needs of operators who value uncompromised effectiveness.
news.headline: ICC, a subsidiary of SMC Global, introduces AvanScav 1450, a safer H₂S scavenger for oilfields, enhancing performance.

news.summary: More than 700 professionals from the nonprofit sector are set to convene in San Antonio for the upcoming Raise 2025 event. Hosted by OneCause, a prominent provider of event and online fundraising solutions, the event will feature presentations and insights from top experts in the fundraising industry. The schedule and lineup of speakers for the event have been officially unveiled, promising attendees a valuable opportunity to learn from some of the brightest minds in the field.
news.headline: Raise 2025 event in San Antonio to gather 700+ nonprofit professionals, featuring top speakers on fundraising.

news.summary: In New York, global professional information provider Wolters Kluwer has shared survey results regarding Artificial Intelligence (AI) adoption in internal audit. The findings indicate that 39% of internal auditors currently utilize AI, with an additional 41% planning to implement AI within the next year. This data was revealed by Frans Klaassen, the Senior Vice President and General Manager of Wolters Kluwer Audit. The survey sheds light on the increasing interest and investment in AI technologies within the internal audit sector.
news.headline: Internal auditors aim to double AI adoption by 2026, with 39% currently using AI and 41% planning to adopt it in 12 months.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Brussels and Prague, pharmaceutical company Zentiva affirmed its commitment to health as a fundamental right, not a privilege. The company stands behind the EU's goal of ensuring universal access to healthcare and supports the UN Sustainable Development Goal 3, which focuses on Health & Wellbeing. This goal is interconnected with other sustainable development goals, highlighting the importance of holistic approaches to global health challenges.
news.headline: Zentiva supports EU healthcare reform; emphasizes health as a right. Calls for sustainable healthcare for all.
